model_specification_line: smf.wls('outcome ~ treatment * I(YEAR >= 2013) + C(YEAR) + C(STATEFIP) + AGE + I(AGE**2) + C(SEX) + C(EDUC) + C(MARST) + UNEMP + LFPR + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION + STATEFINANCIALAID + HIGHEREDBAN + EVERIFY + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + TASK287G + JAIL287G + SECURECOMMUNITIES', data=df, weights=df['PERWT']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['STATEFIP']})
